printed.name: Long Spine
printed.setup: Lying supine in neutral spine position, hips externally rotated, legs straight on diagonal line (45 to 60 degrees), feet in straps, plantarflexed, headrest down
cues: Use hamstrings concentrically rolling up, eccentrically roll down
Anchor pelvis prior to roll up and following roll down
Keep carriage still during roll up and roll down p
